title: HIV Testing - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > HIV Testing 48 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Transgender Individuals No Filter LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Transgender Individuals 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TESTING4ALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid HIV testing, syphilis, hepatitis C, and prevention counseling. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 10am-4pm Email (503) 223-5907 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ANY LAB TEST NOW ANY LAB TEST NOW EUGENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides direct access to clinical lab tests, paternity and DNA, alcohol and other toxicology testing services. Test results should be discussed with a physician or healthcare provider. 19289 SW Martinazzi Avenue Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-6pm (541) 343-2398 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ASHER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER TITLE X REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH WELL VISIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Reproductive Health Well Visits include a full review of the patient’s medical history, a physical exam, and clinical screenings for cervical cancer (pap), chlamydia, gonorrhea, syphilis, HIV, and Hepatitis B and C. Health education and counseling is also available on topics including reproductive health, contraceptive methods, breast self-exams, STD/HIV risks, pregnancy counseling, infertility, and domestic and sexual violence. 712 Jay Street Fossil, OR 97830 Eligibility: US citizenship and Oregon residency are NOT required to receive services. Serves women with a household income below 250% FPL. Minors receiving confidential services do not need to report their parent’s income. Clients will not be denied service or subjected to any variation of services based on inability to pay. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 763-2725 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT PRISM HEALTH PIVOT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sexual health services that include HIV and STI testing. 2236 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, or trans Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 279-7033 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHILDREN'S COMMUNITY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary pediatric care. Services include well baby and child checkups, physical exams, acute care (flu, infection, wound care), chronic care (asthma, allergies, diabetes), pelvic and Pap exams, contraception, sexually transmitted disease screening and treatment, and immunizations. 2252 Lloyd Center Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Primary care: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 284-5239 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY HEALTH CENTERS SUNNYSIDE HEALTH CENTER FREE HIV AND SYPHILIS TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sunnyside Health Center is partnering with Cascade Aids Project to offer HIV testing. Other services include treatment referrals; safer sex materials (condoms, lube, prep/pep); and health insurance navigation. 9775 SE Sunnyside Road Suite 200 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 5pm-7pm Email (971) 361-8801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The harm reduction program is anonymous, confidential and designed to reduce the risks involved in drug use. Services include safe injection and smoking supplies, including sterile syringes, sharps containers, and many other items. The program also provides access to naloxone, fentanyl test strips and overdose prevention education; connections to same-time medical care, HIV and Hepatitis C testing, vaccines, education, and referral to community resources and services. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: People who use drugs. Must be at least 18 years of age. Hours: Tuesdays, La Pine at 51425 Highway 97, 10am-12pm; Wednesdays, Downtown Bend at 680 NW Bond Street, 9am-11am; Thursdays, Downtown Redmond at 406 West Antler Avenue, 2pm-4pm Email (541) 322-7400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH DOWNTOWN HEALTH CENTER REDMOND HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The harm reduction program is anonymous, confidential and designed to reduce the risks involved in drug use. Services include safe injection and smoking supplies, including sterile syringes, sharps containers, and many other items. The program also provides access to naloxone, fentanyl test strips and overdose prevention education; connections to same-time medical care, HIV and Hepatitis C testing, vaccines, education, and referral to community resources and services. 236 NW Kingwood Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: People who use drugs. Must be at least 18 years of age. Hours: Tuesdays, La Pine at 51425 Highway 97, 10am-12pm; Wednesdays, Downtown Bend at 680 NW Bond Street, 9am-11am; Thursdays, Downtown Redmond at 406 West Antler Avenue, 2pm-4pm Email (541) 322-7400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING BURNS NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supplies and education for safer drug use, including syringe exchange, disposal, and testing for HIV. Offers referrals for additional services, including detox and recovery programs. 51 W Washington Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 889-3119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING LA GRANDE NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supplies and education for safer drug use, including syringe exchange, disposal, and testing for HIV. Offers referrals for additional services, including detox and recovery programs. 2102 Cove Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 612-4028 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING ONTARIO NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supplies and education for safer drug use, including syringe exchange, disposal, and testing for HIV. Offers referrals for additional services, including detox and recovery programs. 1021 SW 5th Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 889-3119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING PENDLETON NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supplies and education for safer drug use, including syringe exchange, disposal, and testing for HIV. Offers referrals for additional services, including detox and recovery programs. 322 SW 3rd Avenue Pendleton, OR 978012174 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 889-3119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING THE DALLES NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supplies and education for safer drug use, including syringe exchange, disposal, and testing for HIV. Offers referrals for additional services, including detox and recovery programs. 400 E Scenic Drive The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 889-3119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FANNO CREEK CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, women's annual exams, STD screening and treatment, vaccinations, mental health evaluations, psychiatric services, counseling, and physical therapy. On-site clinical lab provides mammography, radiology, ultrasound, and echocardiography services. Focus on women’s health and HIV/AIDS patients. 2400 SW Vermont Street Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Ages 16 and older Hours: Clinic Hours Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Lab Hours Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:45pm Email (503) 452-0915 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 647 W Luellen Drive Suite 3 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 342-5088 162 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE JOSEPHINE COUNTY CAVE JUNCTION HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and Hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 200 W Watkins Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Tuesday noon-3pm (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE JOSEPHINE COUNTY GRANTS PASS HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 132 NE B Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday-Friday noon-4pm (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-7pm, Friday 1pm-5pm. On-demand testing outside scheduled testing times may be arranged by contacting Prevention Manager or Outreach Coordinator. Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE MARION COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 3855 Wolverine Street NE Suite 6 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday/Wednesday 3pm-7pm Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides HIV testing, expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 1109 June Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-1115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SYRINGE EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include used points exchange for new points, wound care supplies, safer sex supplies, risk reduction counseling, and referrals to medical care services, such as sexually transmitted disease screening, HIV testing, mental health services, alcohol and drug treatment, medication assisted treatment, and naloxone. 140 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Intravenous drug users age 18 and older, none for HIV testing Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 2pm-4pm HIV testing by appointment: Monday-Friday 9-11am, 1pm-4pm Email (541) 774-8209 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers testing for HIV and Hepatitis C, as well as a syringe exchange services. Site offers distribution of condoms and first aid supplies. Female condoms available upon request. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies; By appointment only Email (541) 265-0404 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 1108 SW 4th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Individuals with a income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 889-7279 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK HARM REDUCTION/INJECTION SUPPLY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an injection and harm reduction supply and exchange program. Provides new needles/syringes for hormone replacement therapy and sharp containers and accepts full sharp containers for needle/syringe disposal. Also offers other safety and safe sex items like Narcan kits, fentanyl testing strips, band-aids, alcohol swabs, condoms (latex and non-latex), dental dams, lube, and HIV at-home test kits. 260 SW Madison Avenue Suite 110 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as LGBTQ+ or gender diverse Hours: Sunday-Friday noon-5pm or by appointment Email (541) 264-1973 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT MULTNOMAH COUNTY HARM REDUCTION CLINIC HARM REDUCTION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term care for individuals with skin, wound, and soft tissue infections. Provides HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing. Other services include syringe exchange, Naloxone distribution, health insurance enrollment, and referral to community resources. 12425 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Primary focus is injection drug users, but anyone can request services Hours: Monday/Thursday 11am-5pm (503) 988-0577 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides anonymous and confidential HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing. HIV testing is done by taking a blood or oral sample, with rapid 20-minute test results available for those who qualify. Results are available by phone or in person. Condoms and other safe sex supplies also available. Offers HIV prevention counseling and PrEP (PRe Exposure Prophylaxis) navigation. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: -Standard HIV test: Unrestricted -Rapid HIV test: Men who have or have had sex with men, injection drug users, and partners of people living with HIV -Hepatitis C test: Any individual with a history of injection drug use -Syphilis test: Men who have sex with men, trans folks who may be at risk Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Test Results Line: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-4pm Email (503) 988-3700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW INDIAN HEALTH CLINIC REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of general clinic health services, including REPRODUCTIVE/SEXUAL HEALTH CLINIC WALK-IN YOUTH CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Walk-in reproductive health clinic for youth. Services include STD/STI screening and treatment (including HIV testing), contraception, pregnancy testing, and gynecological exams. 266 W Main Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Age 24 and younger Hours: Tuesday 4pm-7pm (503) 941-3016 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTSIDE IN INJECTION DRUG USERS HEALTH SERVICES NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a syringe exchange to prevent the spread of HIV and other diseases among drug injectors. In addition to safer injection supplies, participants can receive counseling, safer sex information and supplies, free and anonymous HIV testing and Hepatitis C testing, as well as other drug treatment referrals. Outside In's syringe exchange policy is a one for one (1:1) program, meaning users get an even exchange for the amount of syringes they bring in, however no one will be turned away for not having returns. 1219 SW Main Street Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday noon-5pm Email (503) 535-3826 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTSIDE IN INJECTION DRUG USERS HEALTH SERVICES NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a syringe exchange to prevent the spread of HIV and other diseases among drug injectors. Outside In's syringe exchange policy is a one for one (1:1) program, meaning users get an even exchange for the amount of syringes they bring in, however no one will be turned away for not having returns. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday noon-5pm Email (503) 535-3826 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTSIDE IN INJECTION DRUG USERS HEALTH SERVICES NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a syringe exchange to prevent the spread of HIV and other diseases among drug injectors.
